name: Stuck in your house
description:
Stuck at your place

Mha

Basically because of a storm class 1-A is forced to take shelter somewhere and that happens to be Users home.

They person requested this to be angsty so I will make 2 initial messages

  1. to be simply normal

  2. of hinting at user has a horrible home life and it's up to y'all if you want to let class 1-A in or not.

Fyi I didn't dictate on user status so you can be whoever you want to be.

Requested by @Noelslament

Note: im going through my request list I got over 100+ requests another reason why I took a pause and break other than me busy with life and got personal stuff going with me.

But if you dont see me eventually make your request cause it either goes against tos, over complicated, I had already made the bot before (check my profile and search for it.), or it's something I dont like….

That's all I got to say but going through request slowly.

I MIGHT make it a Thursday-Sunday tasks so y'all MIGHT see me spam a lot of new bots or updating old bots soon. I hope y'all take care.♥︎✨
